# AGENTS.md

## Scope
These rules apply to the whole repository.

## Project Intent
- Keep Miraya portfolio-first (Home, Projects, Lab, Manifesto, Contacts).
- Prefer clarity, direct language, and minimal diffs.

## Hard Constraints
- Do not modify style.css visual identity unless explicitly requested.
- Do not rename existing CSS classes without full cross-page update.
- Do not add libraries/build steps for simple content/layout tasks.

## Execution Rules
1. Inspect first, then edit.
2. Keep patches small and reversible.
3. Reuse existing components/styles before adding new ones.
4. Validate links and run build before finalizing when pages/styles change.
5. Summaries must be short: changed files, why, and risks only.

## Token Budget Rules
- Avoid long prose in planning and reports.
- Prefer bullet lists over narrative.
- Include only evidence relevant to the user request.
